# CargoPT

CargoPT is a request service for moving, delivery and transport jobs in Portugal.

Canonical website:
https://cargopt.pt/

Languages:
- Russian: https://cargopt.pt/
- English: https://cargopt.pt/en/
- European Portuguese: https://cargopt.pt/pt/

Primary service:
Users submit one moving or transport request. CargoPT sends the request to suitable carriers. The user can compare offers and choose a carrier.

Area served:
Portugal, including Lisbon, Cascais, Sintra, Porto and intercity routes.

Common use cases:
- apartment moves
- house moves
- office moves
- furniture transport
- appliance transport
- boxes and personal belongings
- pianos
- small commercial loads
- building materials

Important facts:
- Submitting a request is free for the client.
- CargoPT is not itself a moving company.
- Independent carriers perform the transport.
- Price depends on route, volume, floors, elevator access, date and required movers.
- At least one contact method is needed: phone, WhatsApp or email.

Contact:
hello@cargopt.pt
